queries.question: Show me the title, creator and length in hours  of the longest documentary
queries.sql: Select Title, Producer, LengthInMinutes / 60 from Documentaries Order by LengthInMinutes DESC Limit 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?producer ?calc WHERE {
  ?documentaries a :Documentary .
  ?documentaries p:Title ?title .
  ?documentaries p:Producer ?producer .
  ?documentaries p:LengthInMinutes ?lengthinminutes_n .
  BIND((xsd:double(?lengthinminutes_n) / 60) AS ?calc)
  ?documentaries p:LengthInMinutes ?lengthinminutes_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?lengthinminutes_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: For the oldest magazine, list its documentary, producer, director and year established.
queries.sql: Select Documentaries.title, Documentaries.Producer, Director, Magazines.Title, YearEstablished from Documentaries join Magazines on Documentaries.MagazineId = Magazines.MagazineId order by YearEstablished ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?producer ?director ?title2 ?yearestablished WHERE {
  ?documentaries a :Documentary .
  ?magazines a :Magazines .
  ?documentaries p:hasMagazines ?magazines .
  ?documentaries p:Title ?title .
  ?documentaries p:Producer ?producer .
  ?documentaries p:Director ?director .
  ?magazines p:Title ?title2 .
  ?magazines p:YearEstablished ?yearestablished .
  ?magazines p:YearEstablished ?yearestablished_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?yearestablished_o)
LIMIT 1
